title: Master Programs

Master Programs

Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation

Okan Homepage

Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation

MENU

The aim of this program is to raise up physiotherapists who have knowledge and skills of planning and applying the activities for health prevention, maintenance, promotion for individual, family and community, and in case of health problems, planning and conducting the appropriate physiotherapy modalities with the needs of individual; who adopted life-long learning principles; who are recognized nationally and internationally and professionally competent to practice and research.
